episodes.title: Warren Jeffs: Before False Prophet Samuel Bateman's Cult
episodes.description:
The chilling truth behind life in a secretive cult. In this gripping documentary, we unravel the mysteries of Warren Jeffs' tyrannical rule and the courageous journeys of those who dared to break free.

From forced marriages to unimaginable abuse, follow the heart-wrenching stories of individuals trapped within Jeffs' grasp. Their struggles and triumphs will keep you on the edge of your seat, shedding light on the harsh realities faced by cult members.
Absolute Documentaries brings you the best of entertaining and fascinating documentaries for free. Whether you’re into true crime, stories from around the world, family and social life, science or psychology, we’ve got you covered with must-see full-length documentaries every week. 

Subscribe for more premium documentaries: https://bit.ly/AbsoluteDocumentariesYouTube
